description: E3 hunt-line was conditional on wave-77 vision applying an Eldrazi OGW card as LABOR-coded anchor to extend the BFZ Zendikari-resistance trivium across the BFZ-OGW two-set boundary. Vision has not run on the four candidate OGW Eldrazi cards (Consuming Sinkhole BFZ — wait, OGW-094; Eldrazi Aggressor OGW-095; Immobilizer Eldrazi OGW-097; Maw of Kozilek OGW-099) as of wave 77 — all four show vision: false and trivia: false in the OGW directory inventory. Without vision-passed receipts, no canonical-evidence-supported labor-attribution can be drawn, and the BFZ-trivium cannot extend to OGW this wave. E3 fails-open: the trivium-extension prerequisite is unmet. Defer to a future wave once the OGW Eldrazi quartet has been vision-passed.
future-wave-trigger: Once any of the four OGW Eldrazi cards above is vision-passed with LABOR-coded apparatus-of-extraction reading at canonical-evidence rigor (e.g., a card whose oracle/flavor anchors consumption-as-metabolism at the OGW set-specific scope), the BFZ-trivium (3-card or 4-card with wave-76 OGW vision-applied cards Make a Stand rebellion + Affa Protector stewardship) can extend to a BFZ-OGW cross-set trivium-cycle. Wave-76's existing OGW anchors (Make a Stand rebellion, Affa Protector stewardship) already exist; the missing piece is the antagonist-side OGW labor-coded Eldrazi anchor.

WAR-liliana-triumph-status.WAR-Triumph-cycle-corpus-coverage: Only Jace's Triumph (WAR-55) and Nissa's Triumph (WAR-170) are in corpus. Liliana's Triumph is not in inventory. The wave-74 skip-with-receipts continues to hold — the WAR Triumph cycle remains incomplete and the cycle-node commissioning is deferred until the third Triumph lands in inventory or until a sufficient-canonical-coverage threshold-relaxed-precedent is established.

voice_note: Worst-case scenario for Edgelord this wave — the hunt-line was structurally correct, the trivium-extension would have been valuable, the prerequisite was not met. No vision, no receipts. No receipts, no edge. The OGW Eldrazi quartet sits unenriched. Future wave's problem. The discipline holds: do not draw the trivium without the canonical-evidence anchor. Defer cleanly.
